Manage tenants, maintenance, finances, and documents in one place

Built for modern landlords and growing rental portfolios.

Portfolio dashboard

Overdue rent, active maintenance, and property status in one view.

Maintenance requests

Track open work, assignments, and repairs needing action.

Property status

See tenant context, rent status, and linked records quickly.

The problem

Managing rentals gets messy faster than most landlords expect

As portfolios grow, the real challenge is not collecting information. It is keeping tenant records, maintenance issues, payments, and documents organized enough to act on them quickly.

Scattered records

Tenant info, lease documents, and payment history often end up split across inboxes, notes, and spreadsheets.

Maintenance chaos

Requests arrive through texts, calls, and emails with no reliable workflow for follow-up and completion.

Poor visibility

It becomes harder to see what needs attention across your portfolio before issues start piling up.

Reactive management

Landlords spend too much time chasing information instead of managing operations proactively.

One system for the day-to-day operations of rental portfolios

OASIS connects tenant records, maintenance workflows, payments, and documents into one organized system so landlords can see what is happening and act faster.

Tenant management

Keep tenant details, linked properties, and rent context organized in one place.

Maintenance workflow

Track requests, assign work orders, and keep repairs moving with clearer status visibility.

Rental accounting

See paid, due, and overdue rent clearly with finance views shaped for landlords.

Document storage

Store leases, compliance files, and supporting records by tenant, property, or account.

See everything happening across your rental portfolio

OASIS is designed to make the important parts of rental operations visible at a glance, from overdue rent to active maintenance and the records tied to each property.

Core workflows that keep rental operations moving

Explore the three areas where landlords usually feel the most operational friction and where OASIS helps bring more structure and visibility.

Tenant management

Keep tenant records and rent context in one place

See who lives where, what still needs follow-up, and how tenant records connect to the wider rental workflow.

  • centralized tenant profiles
  • linked property context
  • clearer follow-up
Learn more
Maintenance management

Track repairs through a clearer maintenance workflow

Move away from fragmented maintenance follow-up and toward a system that makes status, ownership, and bottlenecks easier to see.

  • request intake
  • work order visibility
  • repair progress tracking
Learn more
Rental accounting

Understand paid, due, and overdue rent faster

Get finance visibility that helps landlords understand income status across the portfolio without rebuilding reports manually.

  • paid and overdue rent
  • property-level visibility
  • faster action on issues
Learn more

What landlords gain with OASIS

Less admin work

Keep records organized and avoid switching between tools just to understand what is happening.

Better maintenance control

Track requests, assignments, and repairs in one place with less guesswork.

Clear financial visibility

See paid, due, and overdue rent across your portfolio without relying on manual trackers.

More professional operations

Run your rentals with a structured system instead of disconnected manual processes.

Simple plans for growing rental portfolios

Choose the plan that fits your current portfolio and move up as your rental operations grow.
